title: Rename application from Fashion Pin to Fashion Forum

requirements.text: Update all occurrences of 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' in the application header/branding within the Layout component

quotes: Change name from fashion pin to fashion forum

acceptanceCriteria: Application name displays as 'Fashion Forum' in the header
No references to 'Fashion Pin' remain visible in the UI

requirements.text: Update the HTML document title from 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' in frontend/index.html

quotes: Change name from fashion pin to fashion forum

acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab displays 'Fashion Forum' as the page title

requirements.text: Replace any remaining 'Fashion Pin' text references with 'Fashion Forum' throughout the frontend codebase, including comments and metadata

quotes: Change name from fashion pin to fashion forum

acceptanceCriteria: All user-facing and code references use 'Fashion Forum' consistently

nonGoals: Changing the visual design or styling of the application
Modifying backend data models or API endpoints
Altering functionality beyond the name change
